warnings: This sheet (A-16) is dedicated entirely to WC.1 — unlike house #3 (where one shared 1:25 plan sheet, A-16, served both WC.1 and WC.2 with only the floor level differing), this house has a SEPARATE dedicated sheet per bathroom: A-16=WC.1 (this page), A-17=WC.2, A-18=WC.3 (both not yet read at time of writing this file).
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_wc1_section.json.
Cross-references the ground-floor plan (หน้า06, element 'ห้องน้ำ1_ground') which showed the same '3 +0.20 5' box and 'WC1 ดูแบบขยาย A-16' callout — consistent.

Door/window reference symbols use triangle shapes on this sheet rather than the circle/hexagon convention documented on the symbol legend (หน้า03) — flagged as a plan-specific notation variant, not necessarily inconsistent (the legend's circle/hexagon convention may apply only to the main floor-plan-level door/window numbering, while this enlarged detail sheet uses its own local triangle callout style).
